solve_notes: Added `String()` method to `ipChecker` that reports active trust options (loopback, link-local, private-net) and any configured CIDR ranges in a human-readable format.
task_text:
The `ipChecker` struct in `ip.go` stores trust configuration
(loopback, link-local, private net, custom ranges) but has no
`String()` method for debugging. When misconfigured, there is no way
to inspect which trust options are active. Add a `String()` method to
`ipChecker` that lists the active trust options and configured IP
ranges in a human-readable format.

thrash_preventing_defs.reason: read: an AI agent would read this to understand the default values for trustLoopback, trustLinkLocal, trustPrivateNet before implementing the String() representation

tier_difference_reasoning: newIPChecker is in thrash_preventing because an AI agent would read it to understand the default values (all true) before deciding how to describe them in String(). Without it, the agent might assume defaults are all false.
